productDisplayName: Puma Men Rugby Navy Blue Polo Tshirts
description: Composition Navy blue and grey striped polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, cotton tipped collar with a buttoned chest placket, collection print on the back, brand badge on right chest and Jumping cat printed on left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your brand statement in style with this striped t-shirt from puma. The energetic Jumping Cat on the chest exudes fiery vibes, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with sportswear when on a fitness drive, and with jeans and sports shoes for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulders-18"
